flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Kentucky University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Eastern Kentucky University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (34.3% → 40.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Kentucky University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (11.0k → 12.3k).
